title: BlueBrixx Pro 108368 – Buzzard with 253 Building Blocks
features: REALISTIC MICE BUZZARD: Recreate one of the most fascinating birds of prey with spread wings, detailed body structure and imposing posture.

Multiple printed stones (prints) for authentic details: eyes, feather structures and colour accents are printed directly on several stones, so that the model looks particularly high quality and lifelike.
Sturdy construction for long-lasting pleasure: the high-quality clamping blocks guarantee a firm connection, so that the mouse buzzard remains securely set up and can be presented in style.
253 building elements for a detailed prey bird model: the fine design ensures an impressive representation of the bird and makes this set a special eye-catcher.
Compatible with standard clamp building blocks from other manufacturers: the set can be combined with other animal and nature models to create your own wild landscape from clamping blocks.
description: Product description Build one of the most famous birds of prey in Europe with the mouse buzzard made of clamping blocks. This 253-piece set recreates the majestic bird of prey with its powerful wings, sharp eyes and impressive posture. The detailed design perfectly captures the powerful and elegant appearance of this bird. Particularly noteworthy are the several printed bricks (prints), which depict fine feather structures and distinctive eyes directly on the building blocks - without stickers. This creates a particularly high-quality and realistic look that makes the model look vibrant. Thanks to the sturdy construction, the mouse buzzard remains securely assembled, while compatibility with standard clamping blocks from other manufacturers offers the possibility to integrate the model into your own animal and natural landscapes. Whether as a fascinating construction project, detailed collector's item or stylish decoration for bird lovers - the mouse buzzard made of clamping blocks brings the majestic world of birds of prey to your clamping building block world! Safety Warning Toy, not suitable for children under 36 months
